landing.baslik: Turn your clean days into a home
landing.aciklama: Every clean day brings you closer to your goal. Track your progress, grow your house, you are not alone.

landing_ozellik.sayac_aciklama: Your clean streak runs live in days, hours, minutes. A relapse resets it, but your longest streak stays your record forever.
landing_ozellik.ev_aciklama: Every clean day earns coins. Spend them on furniture, plants, wallpaper — rare items unlock at 7, 30, and 90 days.
landing_ozellik.sosyal_aciklama: Match anonymously with people on the same path, send encouragement. Only houses are visible — your history stays private.

auth.kayit_aciklama: Just a few details to start your journey.
auth.giris_aciklama: Log in to continue to your house.
auth.eposta_dogrulama_mesaji: Almost done! Click the confirmation link we sent to your email, then you can log in.
auth.sifre_min_uyari: Password must be at least 6 characters.

dashboard.onboarding_aciklama: Set the habit you want to quit and its start date. Optionally add your daily savings to see it add up as you progress.
dashboard.nuks_baslik: Are you sure you want to reset the counter?
dashboard.nuks_aciklama: This resets your clean-day counter. Your longest streak is saved, and you can start again.
dashboard.nuks_not: What happened? (optional, visible only to you)
dashboard.checkin_yapildi: You've checked in today. See you again tomorrow.
dashboard.davet_aciklama: You earn {bonus} coins for every friend who signs up with this link.

ev.habit_yok: You need to start a habit first.
ev.envanter_bos: No unplaced items yet. Get something from the shop!
ev.envanter_ipucu: Click an item, then an empty cell to place it.
ev.grid_ipucu: Click a placed item to send it back to your inventory.

kesif.aciklama: Only houses are visible here — habit type, day counts, and check-in history stay fully private.
kesif.bos: No other houses to discover yet.

mesajlar.esles_bulunamadi: No suitable match found right now. Try again later.
mesajlar.esles_basarili: Matched! You can send them a motivational message.
mesajlar.habit_yok: You need to start a habit first to get matched.
mesajlar.sohbet_yok: No conversations yet. Pick a user or get an anonymous match.
mesajlar.sohbet_secilmedi: Select a conversation to start messaging.
mesajlar.sikayet_aciklama: Your report only goes to the project team, the sender won't be notified.
mesajlar.sikayet_gonderildi: Your report was received, thank you.

cihazlar.kod_aciklama: Paste this code into the ESP32 firmware — it identifies your device.
cihazlar.nukste_otomatik: Automatically cut this device on relapse
cihazlar.cihaz_yok: You haven't added a device yet.
cihazlar.firmware_bilgi: Once you build the physical device, use the example code in the project's /firmware/esp32-akilli-priz folder.

rapor.aciklama: Your check-in history, mood, and relapse count are here.
rapor.habit_yok: You need to start a habit first to see a report.
rapor.ai_ozet_aciklama: Tap the button to get a short AI summary and tip based on this period's data.
